item.title: Story time
item.description: FP Edit: I'm not American and this still hit me hard. If you are American you need to get vocal. Mass protests in the streets. Write letters. Go on strike. Whatever it takes to make leadership hear you. Tell politicians if the don't care about gun deaths they will not be in office. Lobbyists have the advantage of money, but people have the power of numbers.
item.dc:creator: DCA4242

item.title: Memes for Elder Millennials
item.dc:creator: AgentOtter

item.title: My neighbor complained that my front lawn wasn't mowed.
item.description:
I pointed out very politely that we don't live in an HOA, my yard is in compliance with city ordinances, and my yard is so far the only fucking yard one with flowers and plantlife except the one 4 houses down with a retired korean man who gardens like it's his only way to cheat death.
Like seriously. The fucking clover is blooming, I have honey bees everywhere (which is nice since my vegetable garden is now flowering), and it's not ratty looking?
Sure, some thistles or something ruin the meadowscape image, but who cares? At least my front yard doesn't look like a prestamped green tabletop, I can enjoy sitting out front with a drink and just look at the plants.
item.dc:creator: Stoneagedudeman

item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: I miss you.
item.description: Several years ago, my little brother and my parents had a wicked nasty fight. In response, my brother left, moving literally across the country and cut everyone off. I don't know how he is doing, where he is living, or even if he's still identifying as my brother. Wherever he might be, I hope he is having a good day.
item.dc:creator: GratingBobShrillPants

item.title: Bottom shelf magical memes
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: How about an apartment in the metaverse? A nice, succulent Chinese meal?

item.title: Friday meme dump (no politics, just laughs)
item.description:
1. How to work out properly
2
3. It might be a trap
4
5
6. What a you mean I canta have thee garlic?
7. Where gargoyle?
8. Hogwarts logic
9
10
11. Hey baby, let me take you to Poundland
12. New Rhino movie footage just dropped
13. Happi boa
14. Tasty food tax
15. Me when someone appreciates me for me : ) If you liked the humor of this dump I think you might like my wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game, called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)"! Please wishlist, it would really encourage me to finish it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P. S. Have a great Friday and awesome weekend and don't forget to hydrate and take care of yourself. Go on a hike if the weather is nice : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: 10-month weight loss transformation
item.description:
In June 2023 I was at 104 kg (230lbs). Today I am 78kg (172lbs). Still got a ways to go, but I'm happy to see results after thinking I would never be able to change.
July 2023 vs March 2024
October 2022 vs March 2024
item.dc:creator: SplendidAngharad

item.title: Enjoy a few classic Skweezy Jibbs.
item.dc:creator: PlneInchNenis

item.title: A good fucking news for once
item.description:
It's a lipoma and it scared the shit out of me. I lost one beloved cat at the beginning of the year, I wasn't really looking forward to do it again so soon.
Here's Viola. She is not bothered by the lump or the shaved leg. She says always check and inspect your pets and don't ignore lumps or wounds that do not heal. Stay safe!
item.dc:creator: yourbasiccatlady
